/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/ar qc libATProtoPLC.a CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/DIDPLCResolver.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCAuditor.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCCacheDirectory.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCDIDKey.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCMetrics.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCMockStore.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCOperation.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCPersistentStore.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCReplicaServer.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCReplicaStore.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCRotationKeyManager.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCServer.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCSyncClient.m.o CMakeFiles/ATProtoPLC.dir/Garazyk/Sources/PLC/PLCSyncEngine.m.o
